To the one who found and reads this letter. Survivor! For a long time I tried to create a cure for Tuberculosis and protection against infection of Tuberculosis, I succeeded! But the horde of zombies that were chasing me drove me into a trap. There is little time left and the zombies will break down the doors of the room in which I took refuge. I'll die... Fulfill my last wish! Take the vaccine recipe from my suitcase and share it with good people! Farewell...

To the one who found and reads this letter. Survivor! For a long time I tried to create a cure for Norovirus and protection against infection of Norovirus, I succeeded! But the horde of zombies that were chasing me drove me into a trap. There is little time left and the zombies will break down the doors of the room in which I took refuge. I'll die... Fulfill my last wish! Take the vaccine recipe from my suitcase and share it with good people! Farewell...

The note contains the address where the Gastroenterologist began experiments to create a vaccine that would stop the effects of the Norovirus.

In the note, the Gastroenterologist complains that it is impossible to work in this building, there are no tools and zombies are constantly attacking. We need to find a new place to work (the address is indicated in the margins of the note).

In the note, the Gastroenterologist reports that he was able to make mod to protect yourself, the protection is complete! All that remains is to find laboratory equipment and create a vaccine against Norovirus (the following address is written in small handwriting).
In the note, the Gastroenterologist reports that he was able to make a vaccine against Norovirus, but he was tracked down by a horde of zombies, he will try to hide from the zombies at this address.
